tagline: ปกป้องวัดไทยจากผีร้าย ด้วยพลังยักษ์
mechanics: Tap to summon Yaksha guardians on lanes
Enemies walk from right to left toward the temple
Mana regenerates over time for summoning
Different Yaksha types: melee, ranged, tank
Upgrade guardians by merging same type
Game over when temple HP reaches 0
